title: gladiolus inandensis
intro: Gladiolus inandensis, also known as the Himalayan gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gladiolus inandensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In traditional herbal medicine, Gladiolus inandensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
